defect: thermal growth offset ignored on hot service
prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.

The observed field condition is: thermal growth offset ignored on hot service. The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: API 686, laser system manuals.
title: Fault diagnosis: Shaft alignment (production floor)
